caption: A fair-skinned man with blond hair, wearing round glasses, silver over-ear headphones, and a dark navy blue t-shirt, is speaking while looking toward the camera. He is positioned in front of a blue and white framed sign that features the number "20" and a small graphic of a creature. To his left, blurred colorful lights are visible in the background. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, but his facial expressions and gestures evolve as he talks. He begins by gesturing with his right arm extended outward and his mouth open. As the sequence progresses, his arm moves out of view, and he focuses his expression, with his mouth shifting from a wide open position to a more rounded shape as he continues to speak. He wears a thin gold chain around his neck.
